base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of palette_chart_all_variants — a ui (hud_readout) from 1980 pac man. Mega palette-reference chart — every in-game sprite (Pac-Man, all 4 ghosts frightened+normal, fruits, dots, score-popups, font) rendered in all ~16 palette indices used across levels 1-256. Each palette block includes: characters row, alphabet row, fruits column, score-popups column. Levels 1-6 have distinct palettes. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Mega palette-reference chart — every in-game sprite (Pac-Man, all 4 ghosts frightened+normal, fruits, dots, score-popups, font) rendered in all ~16 palette indices used across levels 1-256. Each palette block includes: characters row, alphabet row, fruits column, score-popups column. Levels 1-6 have distinct palettes; levels 7+ cycle through repeats until kill-screen glitch at level 256
